{{Infobox technique
| name = Striker techniques
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Striker techniques Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Striker]] techniques are individual offensive attacks characterized by a distinct input and output, often appearing as elongated projections of power. They are used to enhance specific motions or project [[madra]] outward, such as in the form of beams, projectiles, or elemental manifestations like lightning, shadows, or serpents. While they can be used to strike physical targets, some advanced versions possess spiritual aspects that allow them to damage a target's soul or disrupt madra channels. Some highly advanced users can imbue these techniques with a living will, making them behave like spirits or sentient entities. [[Striker]] techniques are often compared to [[Enforcer techniques]]; while [[Enforcers]] focus on enhancing a single motion and can be more powerful, they are frequently clumsier and leave the user vulnerable. [[Striker]] techniques can also overlap with [[Enforcer]] styles depending on a practitioner's [[Path]]. In combat, these attacks can be used in rapid succession to create a continuous flow of destruction, or they can be launched in massive volleys from constructs, weapons, or even portals. They are capable of being blocked by shields and barriers, though powerful versions can shatter such defenses or bypass them through spiritual damage.}}

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Striker techniques]] can be released by Underlords.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The techniques mentioned ([[Spear of the Golden Sun]], [[Heart-seizing Claw]], [[Phoenix Wing Burst]], [[Song of Falling Ash]], [[Gravetouch]], and [[black dragon's breath]]) are all [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker]] techniques are powerful combat methods utilized by [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]]. These attacks possess the ability to project power outward and can even be directed at flying targets. During combat, [[Akura Grace]] incorporates these techniques into her various attack patterns. The intensity of these strikes is such that they can scorch the air, though they can also be wiped away by [[Eithan]]'s power.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker techniques]] are combat methods used by [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker techniques]] can project power outward.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c4">''Uncrowned'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] mixes [[Striker techniques]] into her attack patterns.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker techniques]] scorch the air above [[Lindon]] during the battle.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]]'s power wiped away [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker techniques]] can be used against flying targets.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Striker techniques]] are powerful attacks.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] used [[Striker techniques]] in her match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] had previously absorbed [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]]'s [[sword]] styles include patterns meant to launch [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The combatants traded slashes and [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Attackers used [[Striker techniques]] to slice through stone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] uses a barrage of [[Striker techniques]] against the [[Elder]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Striker techniques]] manifest as pulses of light in every color.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Hurling [[Striker techniques]] from outside the field did nothing to the [[Titan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The woman uses [[Striker techniques]] that involve flying blades.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Striker techniques]] caused wounds to be cut into pieces from heat.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Striker techniques]] can light up the sky and shake the ground.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] used [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Weeping Dragon]]'s hallmark is draconic serpents of blue-and-gold lightning [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Striker techniques]] are used by [[Arelius artists]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] and [[Yerin]] used [[Striker techniques]] against [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
